sourceMovie.title: Last Signal
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Last Signal works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Deep Impact
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Last Signal clicked for you, Deep Impact (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: San Andreas
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Last Signal clicked for you, San Andreas (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Last Signal?
faq.answer: Try Deep Impact, San Andreas, Armageddon—each shares DNA with Last Signal while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Last Signal?
faq.answer: Last Signal (2022) is best described as Drama, Science Fiction, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Last Signal worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
